mapper.select: SELECT rent_ctrt_no /*kr.or.ddit.domain.central.mapper.IContractUserMapper.selectRentCtrtNo*/ FROM rent_ctrt WHERE user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY reg_dt DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMMDD') || '_' || /*kr.or.ddit.domain.central.mapper.IContractUserMapper.insertAplct*/ #{userNo} || '_' || LPAD(NVL( (SELECT COUNT(*) + 1 FROM aplct WHERE aplct_no LIKE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMMDD') || '_' || #{userNo} || '%') , 1), 2, '0') FROM dual
INSERT INTO aplct ( aplct_no , ho_ty_no , ann_no , user_no , aplct_stts_cd , reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{aplctNo} , #{hoTyNo} , #{annNo} , #{userNo} , 'SUBMIT' , SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT ht.EXCLUSIVE_SIZE , ht.room_cnt , ht.bathroom_cnt , rl.dpst_amt , rl.mthly_rent_amt , ac.apt_cmplex_nm , ac.dorojuso FROM rent_listing rl INNER JOIN apt_detail ad ON rl.ho_no = ad.ho_no INNER JOIN apt_ho_ty ht ON ad.ho_ty_no = ht.ho_ty_no INNER JOIN apt_complex ac ON ht.apt_cmplex_no = ac.apt_cmplex_no WHERE ht.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo}

SELECT ht.exclusive_size , ht.ty_nm , ht.room_cnt , ht.bathroom_cnt , ht.image_file_no , MIN(rl.dpst_amt) AS dpst_amt , MIN(rl.mthly_rent_amt) AS mthly_rent_amt FROM rent_listing rl INNER JOIN apt_detail ad ON rl.ho_no = ad.ho_no INNER JOIN apt_ho_ty ht ON ad.ho_ty_no = ht.ho_ty_no WHERE ht.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} AND rl.ann_no = #{annNo} AND rl.rcrt_lstg_stts_cd = 'SUBSCRIBE' GROUP BY ht.exclusive_size , ht.ty_nm , ht.room_cnt , ht.bathroom_cnt , ht.image_file_no ORDER BY ht.ty_nm

SELECT a.aplct_no /*신청번호*/ /*kr.or.ddit.domain.central.mapper.IContractUserMapper.selectAplctList*/ , a.ann_no /*공고번호*/ , a.aplct_stts_cd /*신청상태코드*/ , a.reg_dt /*등록일시*/ , aht.exclusive_size /*전용면적*/ , aht.ty_nm /*타입명*/ , cab.ttl /*제목*/ , cab.rcrt_end_dt /*모집종료일*/ , ac.apt_cmplex_nm /*아파트 단지 명*/ , m.user_nm /*사용자명*/ , m.user_telno /*사용자 전화번호*/ FROM aplct a INNER JOIN apt_ho_ty aht on a.ho_ty_no = aht.ho_ty_no INNER JOIN center_ann_board_post cab on a.ann_no = cab.ann_no INNER JOIN apt_complex ac on ac.apt_cmplex_no = aht.apt_cmplex_no INNER JOIN member m ON m.user_no = a.user_no WHERE a.user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY a.reg_dt DESC

SELECT a.aplct_no /*kr.or.ddit.domain.central.mapper.IContractUserMapper.selectOneContractHistoryDetail*/ , a.ann_no , a.aplct_stts_cd , a.reg_dt , a.rjct_rsn_cn , aht.exclusive_size , aht.ty_nm , cab.ttl , cab.rcrt_end_dt , ac.apt_cmplex_nm , m.user_nm , m.user_telno FROM aplct a INNER JOIN apt_ho_ty aht ON a.ho_ty_no = aht.ho_ty_no INNER JOIN center_ann_board_post cab ON cab.ann_no = a.ann_no INNER JOIN apt_complex ac ON ac.apt_cmplex_no = aht.apt_cmplex_no INNER JOIN member m ON m.user_no = a.user_no WHERE a.aplct_no = #{aplctNo}

SELECT sbmsn_doc_no /*kr.or.ddit.domain.central.mapper.IContractUserMapper.selectSbmsnDocList*/ ,sbmsn_doc_ty_cd ,reg_dt ,atch_file_id ,aplct_no FROM sbmsn_doc WHERE aplct_no = #{aplctNo} ORDER BY reg_dt DESC

SELECT doc_ty.sbmsn_doc_ty_cd , (SELECT sd.sbmsn_doc_no FROM sbmsn_doc sd WHERE sd.sbmsn_doc_ty_cd = doc_ty.sbmsn_doc_ty_cd AND sd.aplct_no = #{aplctNo} AND ROWNUM = 1) AS sbmsn_doc_no , (SELECT sd.atch_file_id FROM sbmsn_doc sd WHERE sd.sbmsn_doc_ty_cd = doc_ty.sbmsn_doc_ty_cd AND sd.aplct_no = #{aplctNo} AND ROWNUM = 1) AS atch_file_id , (SELECT sd.reg_dt FROM sbmsn_doc sd WHERE sd.sbmsn_doc_ty_cd = doc_ty.sbmsn_doc_ty_cd AND sd.aplct_no = #{aplctNo} AND ROWNUM = 1) AS reg_dt FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(cap.sbmsn_doc, '[^,]+', 1, lv.lvl)) AS sbmsn_doc_ty_cd FROM aplct a INNER JOIN center_ann_board_post cap ON cap.ann_no = a.ann_no INNER JOIN ( SELECT LEVEL AS lvl FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 20 ) lv ON lv.lvl <= REGEXP_COUNT(cap.sbmsn_doc, ',') + 1 WHERE a.aplct_no = #{aplctNo} ) doc_ty
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sbmsn_doc WHERE aplct_no = #{aplctNo} AND atch_file_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(cap.sbmsn_doc, '[^,]+', 1, lv.lvl)) AS sbmsn_doc_ty_cd FROM aplct a INNER JOIN center_ann_board_post cap ON cap.ann_no = a.ann_no INNER JOIN ( SELECT LEVEL AS lvl FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 20 ) lv ON lv.lvl <= REGEXP_COUNT(cap.sbmsn_doc, ',') + 1 WHERE a.aplct_no = #{aplctNo} ) doc_ty WHERE doc_ty.sbmsn_doc_ty_cd IS NOT NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE aplct SET aplct_stts_cd = 'INSPECTION', mdf_dt = SYSDATE WHERE aplct_no = #{aplctNo}
